title: Inline Codes Removal
description: Removes inline codes from the text units content of a document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

stripSource.title: Strip codes in the source text
stripSource.description: Apply the selected removal action to the source text of each text unit

stripTarget.title: Strip codes in the target text
stripTarget.description: Apply the selected removal action to the target text of each text unit

mode.title: What to remove
mode.description: Select what parts of the inline codes to remove
x-enumLabels: Remove code marker, but keep code content  ("<ph x='1'>[X]</ph>" ==> "[X]")
Remove code content, but keep code marker  ("<ph x='1'>[X]</ph>" ==> "<ph x='1'/>")
Remove code marker and code content  ("<ph x='1'>[X]</ph>" ==> "")

includeNonTranslatable.title: Apply to non-translatable text units
includeNonTranslatable.description: Apply the removal action even to text units marked as non-translatable

replaceWithSpace.title: Replace line break codes with spaces (When removing content AND marker)
replaceWithSpace.description: Replace line-break inline codes with spaces instead of removing them entirely (only when removing both marker and content)
